title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.text: One day, on an outing with Meisho Doto...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh! Sorry...s-sorry for stopping so suddenly!

Meisho Doto points toward a claw machine filled
with Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I d-do! They have Opera O and so many other
talented racers... So...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
If I had one for myself, maybe their confidence
would rub off on me...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: But I'm horrible at these games... Even if I do manage to pick one up with the claw, it always falls right out... Sniffle!
choice_data_list: Do you want me to win you one?
Do you want me to win you one?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: What?! No, th-that would be a t-terrible burden...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Even though... it would be make me very happy.
There's no way I can fail now!
